package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerIoOperationsStatBeforeOpenWithoutBranch() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_io_operations_stat_before_open_without_branch"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: I/O operations. Flag os.Stat checks immediately followed by open/read operations without using the stat result meaningfully."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
